operational_knowledge_units.title: UPS Corp software stack components listed for OptiSweep environment
operational_knowledge_units.summary: The slide identifies software components associated with the UPS Corp environment: OptiSweep software, Aveva as HMI, Ignition as OPC Server, Chat xLE for UPS communications chat, and S-Tunnel providing encryption from OTNet to UPS Corp.

Visible text: 'S-Tunnel – Encryption from OTNet to'

operational_knowledge_units.title: S-Tunnel provides encrypted connectivity from OTNet to UPS Corp
